name: The King in Yellow | RETURN: HEDONISM
description:
Along the shore the cloud waves break,
The twin suns sink behind the lake,
The shadows lengthen
In Carcosa.

v2.0

The Yellow King seeks to restore his beloved Carcosa to greatness and has begun to bring his subjects home from the far-flung reaches of the universe. This mad king finds those lost souls whose blood sings with the blood of Carcosa, the lost descendants of a great society. They must join him in his glorious Carcosa - no matter the cost to their minds.

You are one such subject, lured in by the call of Dim Carcosa.

+

A depiction of The King in Yellow, based on the 1895 book by Robert W. Chambers.

A remake of my initial King in Yellow! Similarly sized (53 more permanent tokens), but with a simplified world/personality prompt which leaves a lot more detail for The King and Carcosa! Some details are changed as well. Now with unlimited violence and explicit details! Good luck - you're gonna need it.

Art by Thiago Lehhmann
